page_metadata.biotools__summary: Performs Mantel-Haenszel's test for k strata of 2x2 tables. Mantel and Haenszel proposed this asymptotic test based on the chi-2 distribution. Assuming no three-way interaction (k independent strata).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Performs Mantel-Haenszel's test for k strata of 2x2 tables. Mantel and Haenszel proposed this asymptotic test based on the chi-2 distribution. Assuming no three-way interaction (k independent strata).
